recommendations.title: Under the Sea: A Descendants Story
recommendations.overview: Mal emerges from the shadows of a mystical forest onto a dark coastline where she crosses paths with Dizzy.

recommendations.title: Haunted Mansion
recommendations.overview: A woman and her son enlist a motley crew of so-called spiritual experts to help rid their home of supernatural squatters.

recommendations.title: The Ewok Adventure
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Wicket the Ewok and his friends agree to help two shipwrecked human children, Mace and Cindel, on a quest to find their parents.

recommendations.title: The Claus Family
recommendations.overview: When his grandfather suddenly falls ill, holiday-hating Jules learns of his family's magical legacy and realizes he's the only hope to save Christmas.

recommendations.title: Just in Time for Christmas
recommendations.overview: Lindsay is faced with a life-altering decision as Christmas approaches: Stay in her tiny hometown and marry boyfriend Jason or accept a coveted post teaching at an Ivy League college on the other side of the country. What to do? Fortunately for Linds

recommendations.title: Miraculous World: New York, United HeroeZ
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, TV Movie, Action, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Marinette’s class is headed to New York, the city of superheroes, for French-American Friendship Week.

recommendations.title: The Spirit of Christmas
recommendations.overview: A woman falls in love with a man who is somewhat unavailable.

recommendations.title: Nightbreed
recommendations.overview: A troubled young man is drawn to a mythical place called Midian where a variety of friendly monsters are hiding from humanity. Meanwhile, a sadistic serial killer is looking for a patsy.

recommendations.title: Ghidorah, the Three-Headed Monster
recommendations.overview: After a meteorite unleashes a three-headed beast upon Tokyo, Mothra tries to unite with Godzilla and Rodan to battle the extraterrestrial threat.

recommendations.title: Skinamarink
recommendations.overview: Two children wake up in the middle of the night to find their father is missing, and all the windows and doors in their home have vanished.
